title: lichen_l2_send linearizes packet before checking HAVE_LICHEN_LINK
description: lichen_l2.c lines 162-170: The packet is linearized into tx_ipv6_buf before checking if LICHEN link layer is available. If HAVE_LICHEN_LINK is 0, the raw IPv6 is sent anyway, so linearization is still needed. Not an inefficiency - just noting the ordering is correct.
close_reason: Invalid - not an inefficiency. Linearization is needed regardless of HAVE_LICHEN_LINK since both paths send the packet.
